Carnelian Bay · North Lake Tahoe

Your Tahoe home since 1970 — where every stay feels like a family tradition

Check Availability

Tucked into the pines of Carnelian Bay on the North Shore of Lake Tahoe, our charming cabin has been welcoming guests — and their dogs — since 1970. With its eclectic personality, cozy reading nooks, and one-of-a-kind art collection, this is not your average rental. It's a place with a soul.

🐾
Dog Friendly
The whole family is welcome — including four-legged members. Dog towels and toys provided.
⛷️
20 Min to 4 Resorts
Palisades Tahoe, Alpine Meadows, Northstar & Diamond Peak — all within 20 minutes.
🌲
Trails Out Back
Burton Creek State Park starts at your back door — hike, bike, or just breathe the pine air.

"Dog Friendly. Family Loved. Tahoe Ready Since 1970."

Step inside and feel instantly at home. Vaulted wood-beam ceilings, vintage ski art, a wood burning stove, and a back deck made for long summer evenings. The cabin is stocked, the WiFi is fast, and Garwood's restaurant is a short walk away.
